scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --workspace=frontend && npm install --workspace=backend
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=backend && npm run build --workspace=frontend
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start --workspace=backend" "PORT=3001 npm run start --workspace=frontend"
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace=backend" "PORT=3001 npm run dev --workspace=frontend"
